author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Scaffolding fix for GH#554 already landed via commit e9e5bc52 (PR #550 for the same bug filed as #549). Remaining gap: test coverage still only mentioned safe-fetch/knowledge, so a future regression re-dropping agent-prompt-server.py would slip through. Closed the gap by (1) renaming test_init_deploys_mcp_knowledge_server to test_init_deploys_mcp_servers and asserting all 3 scripts exist + all 3 .mcp.json entries, (2) extending test_embedded_constants_not_empty to cover KNOWLEDGE_SERVER_PY, AGENT_PROMPT_SERVER_PY, HEARTBEAT_PY, and (3) extending test_init_writes_manifest to require all 3 MCP scripts. 83/83 init tests pass, fmt clean.
